content.en:
"Why is this happening?"

The gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm were extremely angry, but anger was useless, the enemies were all dead, but the losses of Tianhe Dao Mountain were too serious.

The gods of the Liuhe Realm were killed, and many of the gods of the realm fell.

As for those half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms and Eternal Dao Realms that were affected, there were countless of them, and this was not something that could be recovered in a short period of time at all, and it was normal that they could never even recover.

Soon.

Loss statistics are complete.

"Heavenly Providence Realm God, the preliminary statistics of the losses have come out, in addition to the fall of the Liuhe Realm God, there are also six Eternal Realm Divine Realm mid-level powerhouses who have fallen, twenty-seven Eternal Realm Divine Realm Beginner Realm Gods have fallen, and sixty-three ordinary Eternal Realm Divine Realm have fallen. One hundred and twenty-three Half-Step Eternal Realm Gods fell, and thirty-six thousand one hundred and fifty-five Eternal Dao Realm fell. "A surviving ordinary realm god came to report.

"I see!"

The God of the Heavenly Providence Realm waved his hand, and immediately let the Tianhe Dao Mountain rebuild and recover.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian was in a good mood, this time he made Tianhe Dao Mountain lose at least two-thirds of its combat power, and destroyed many buildings and treasures in Tianhe Dao Mountain, which was enough to make Tianhe Dao Mountain unable to develop for a long time.

197 However, he was still ready to cultivate another realm god to copy the body, and then attack Tianhe Dao Mountain, but this time he didn't have to be in such a hurry.

After all, now that Tianhe Dao Mountain is in such a situation, how can he have the energy to deal with him!

Even because of the heavy losses of Tianhe Dao Mountain, some hostile forces will have bad thoughts about Tianhe Dao Mountain.

Therefore, there are many things to worry about in Tianhe Daoshan now!

"Tianhe Dao Mountain is just a small trouble for me, there is no need to worry about it now, and the Endless Realm Alliance will not be disturbed by those realm gods of the Eternal Realm, so it can develop with peace of mind. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the days to come, he just needed to practice in peace.

Of course, he also wanted to get more Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, so that his Eternal Dao Seed would be able to improve faster, and he could also make his wife and children be able to quickly improve the Eternal Dao Seed.

However, the forces around Momen's generation were almost unable to come up with more Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substances.

"Wait for the Realm of God to trade all over the realm, so as to obtain more Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal materials!"

Ye Tian thought so.

Therefore, he planned to establish a Terran Chamber of Commerce and go to various places to trade, including the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance.

Of course.

Is he too lazy to do such a thing, or leave it to his son Ye Xingchen to do, which can be regarded as giving him something to do.

this day.

Ye Tian called Ye Xingchen to him and ordered: "Xingchen, you go and establish a Terran Chamber of Commerce force, trade with other eternal realms and forces, and collect some Xuan Devouring Demon Crystals in secret, if you lack any resources, you can find me to get them!"

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen is very energetic, trading the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Material, if this transaction is made, wouldn't it be able to greatly improve the Eternal Dao Seed!

Last time, he had refined a little bit of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, and he had raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, thus condensing the second Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

If he had enough Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, he could quickly raise the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit, so as to condense the third Perfect Eternal Dao Seed!

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen went to form the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce, and asked many Terran Realm Gods to enter the Chamber of Commerce to help, after all, in the Realm God Kingdom Realm, if there are not even a few Realm Gods, how can they trade.

A half-step Eternal Realm God Realm wants to trade with the Realm God, and the other Realm God doesn't pay attention to you at all.

Of course.

In the early days of the establishment of the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce, there would definitely be some troubles, unless it was something that could not be solved, Ye Tian would not make a move.

...... (ahdh)

In the following days, the Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce was successfully formed, and at the beginning, it traded in many eternal realms near Momen's generation, and many Terran Eternal Dao Realms joined this chamber of commerce.

From the very beginning, the Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce was naturally subject to many obstacles and minor troubles, but basically Ye Xingchen solved the troubles.

Ye Xingchen has condensed two perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirits, and his combat power is not weak, although it is not as good as Ye Tian's original combat power, but the same level is still invincible, and compared with the Eternal Realm God Realm Middle-level Realm Gods who condensed four Eternal Realm Spirits, it is not much weaker at all, and he can kill him for a while.

Therefore, as long as he didn't encounter the middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm, Ye Xingchen could almost sweep those realm gods.

And the middle-level powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm are not cabbages, there are not a few middle forces, and there are not many powerful forces in Momen.

At the moment, the Terran Holy Kingdom is only trading in the territory of Momen, and after billions of Dao eras, the Terran Holy Kingdom has gained a firm foothold in this territory and has begun to expand outward, opening new branches in various parts of the Eastern Wu Realm, so as to trade.

At this time, trouble came, and Ye Xingchen alone couldn't solve the trouble. []

"Father, I need your help!"

Ye Xingchen came to find Ye Tian.

"Is there any trouble with the Terran Holy Land Chamber of Commerce?" Ye Tian asked.

"There is a powerful chamber of commerce force that is suppressing us!" Ye Xingchen said: "Our Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce is currently expanding its business in the territory where another powerful force, Longmen Mountain, is located, and in that place, there is also a branch of the Heaven Scanner Chamber of Commerce, a powerful force Chamber of Commerce, and our Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce is developing too fast, and there are also some resources given by you, father, which make the Heaven Scanner Chamber of Commerce feel threatened, so it is frantically suppressing us." "

"Skyscanner Chamber of Commerce, what kind of strength are they?"

Ye Tian asked.

"An Eternal Realm Divine Realm Intermediate Realm God God who condenses five Eternal Realm Spirits, and six Eternal Realm Divine Realm Intermediate Realm Gods who condense four Eternal Realm Spirits, there are about more than twenty Eternal Realm Divine Realm Junior Realm Gods, and there are nearly two hundred ordinary Realm Gods. "

This data is okay among the powerful forces, of course, it is not as good as Tianhe Dao Mountain.

However, this time it is necessary to face a powerful force head-on, whereas previously it was in the shadows.

"I'll go myself!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

......

Longmen Stone City.

Ye Tian followed his son Ye Xingchen here, this is the capital of the Longmen country under the command of Longmen Mountain, and it is also a giant city that accommodates a large number of strong people, and many branches of forces have gathered here, making it very prosperous.

The Terran Holy Kingdom Chamber of Commerce Branch and the Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce Branch are all here, so the conflict broke out.
